name: Marinated Mozzarella with Herbs
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon red pepper flakes, if desired
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cubed mozzarella in a large shallow pan or bowl.
2. Top with remaining ingredients: shredded basil, chopped parsley, olive oil, salt, pepper, and red pepper flakes (if using).
3. Gently coat the cheese slices or cubes evenly with the mixture.
4. Cover tightly and refrigerate for at least 2 hours to allow flavors to meld.
5. When ready to serve, turn out the mozzarella onto a serving platter.
6. Serve with grilled bread or pick up individual cubes to enjoy as an appetizer.
